pr.title: Non-record: 11L MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full SOTA Stack (mean val_bpb=1.1330, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d transformer stacks MLP3.5x LeakyReLU^2, partial RoPE, SmearGate+hash cascading, gated attention, Value Residual and U-Net skips.
techniques: SmearGate+Bigram/Trigram hash gating with Value Residual-enhanced XSA layers
MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, partial RoPE, U-Net skips with tied FP16 embeddings
Muon schedule with Late QAT, int6 GPTQ-lite quant + sliding-window eval
